message:
fix: remove flow control throttle that causes PTY deadlock (#194)

The 100ms throttle between pause↔resume transitions could cause a
permanent deadlock: if resume was throttled inside the term.write()
callback, the PTY stayed paused forever because no new data would
arrive to trigger another callback. The server-side concatenated
JSON guard (PR #191) already prevents the rapid oscillation that
the throttle was meant to address.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
